chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1138 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG has filed a statement, which is taken on record and submits that the benevolent fund has been paid to the widow in her bank account. Learned counsel for the petitioner expressing his satisfaction, does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
